esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Any non-zero sustained deadlock rate is a serious concurrency problem
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_deadlocks = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_deadlocks > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_deadlocks
